title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Marico - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Marico - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Marico has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Marico:
Marico is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marico!
